hero.title: Welcome to YourMelier!
hero.p1: This is a personal project built to experiment with new tools and technologies—and to create a virtual sommelier.
hero.p2: Thank you sincerely for taking part: your help is invaluable in testing this experiment. Because this is still a “closed doors” beta, please keep strict confidentiality about everything you see inside.
hero.p3: Thank you for being part of this experiment!

landing.bodyP1: This is a personal project built to experiment with new tools and technologies—and to create a virtual sommelier.
landing.bodyP2: Thank you sincerely for taking part: your help is invaluable in testing this experiment. Because this is still a “closed doors” beta, please keep strict confidentiality about everything you see inside.
landing.bodyP3: Thank you for being part of this experiment!
landing.surveyHint: By filling out this short questionnaire after trying the app, you’ll help me improve it in concrete ways. It takes less than 2 minutes—thank you for your time!

surveyPage.intro: This survey is anonymous so you can be completely honest in your ratings. And you can keep telling me how much you enjoyed this experiment 😄

survey.title: Survey
survey.intro: Thanks for your time — your answers help us improve YourMelier.
survey.success: Thank you! Your survey was submitted.
survey.error: Could not submit. Please try again later.

q_scope.label: How clear was the app’s purpose on first use?

q_ease.label: How easy was it to start using the app without instructions?

q_first.label: What was your first impression of the app?

q_relevance.label: How relevant were the suggested wines compared to the dish you entered?

q_reason.label: Was the reason the wine was suggested useful to you?

q_improve.label: What would improve the quality of the suggestions, in your view?

q_nav.label: How smooth is navigation between screens?

q_least.label: Which part of the app felt least intuitive?

q_technical.label: Did you notice technical issues or slowdowns while using the app?

q_links.label: How useful do you find direct links to marketplaces?

q_confidence.label: Would you feel confident buying a wine based on the app’s suggestion?
q_confidence.depends: It depends on price or how rare the wine is

q_clicked.label: Did you try clicking a purchase link?

q_real.label: How useful do you think this app could be in real situations?

q_reuse.label: How likely are you to use the app again in the future?

q_nps.label: From 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend YourMelier to a friend?

q_platform.label: Would this solution be more useful as a web page or as an app on your phone?

q_like_least.label: What did you like least or what bothered you?

q_feature.label: What feature would you add to make the app more complete?

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.intro: Report bugs, ideas, or improvements. Optional fields help us get back to you.
suggestions.name: Name (optional)
suggestions.success: Thank you! Your suggestion was sent.
suggestions.error: Could not submit. Please try again later.

cookies.message: This site uses essential cookies for authentication. No tracking.
